seoTitle: Tutye vs Tyaak — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tutye and Tyaak. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tutye and Tyaak.
heading: Tutye vs Tyaak — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tutye, Victoria and Tyaak, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tutye has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Tyaak (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tutye or Tyaak safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tutye has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Tyaak scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tutye scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Tyaak scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tutye or Tyaak?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tutye has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
